one_liner: Podio is a customizable work/CRM platform offering a broad REST API with OAuth2, API key (app), and basic auth options, self-serve free-tier API access, and an official MCP server for AI-agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: Server-side flow (web apps) and client-side flow (SPA) via redirect to podio.com
App authentication flow using app ID + app token for single-app, no-user-interaction access
Password authentication (username/password) for testing or batch jobs, deprecated/discouraged for production

self_serve_notes: Free plan includes API access with baseline 1,000 calls/day; developers can self-serve generate client_id/client_secret at podio.com/settings/api. Higher throughput requires paid API Growth add-ons on paid plans.

api_surface.notes: Podio REST API covers organizations, workspaces, apps, items, tasks, files, etc., with official SDKs for .NET, JS/Node, PHP, Android, Objective-C.

evidence.supports: Details server-side, app, and password authentication flows, and client_id/client_secret setup
Describes server-side, client-side, app auth, and password auth flows for JS SDK
Self-serve generation of client_id and client_secret
Official Podio MCP server URL enabling AI agent integration with 22 tools
